---
title: "My first website"
author: "Bárbara"
affiliation: "Universidade do Minho"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 400px
      gutter-width: 1.5rem    
    theme:
      light: minty
      dark: superhero
    self-contained: true
    lang: pt
---

# Presentation
This is Bárbara's website!

## Sub presentation

Sub section.

### Sub sub section

Another sub sub section.
 
#### My paragraph

This is a paragraph.
